title: RGIPT Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for GeM/ CPP Purchasing & Procurement Executive Posts
organization: Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Petroleum Technology (RGIPT)
short_info: Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Petroleum Technology (RGIPT) GeM/CPP Purchasing & Procurement Executive Notification 2026 has been released on the official website rgipt.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the RGIPT GeM/CPP Purchasing & Procurement Executive Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's/Master's degree in Commerce, Management, Engineering, or related field
qualification.details: Bachelor's/Master's degree in Commerce, Management, Engineering, or related field.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for RGIPT GeM/CPP Purchasing & Procurement Executive Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 07-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the RGIPT GeM/CPP Purchasing & Procurement Executive recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 07 June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the GeM/CPP Purchasing & Procurement Executive post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary ranging from Rs. 40,000 to Rs. 50,000 per month.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor's or Master's degree in Commerce, Management, Engineering, or a related field.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the GeM/CPP Purchasing & Procurement Executive position?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the GeM/CPP Purchasing & Procurement Executive post.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for RGIPT recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the provided information.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve shortlisting of eligible candidates.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity at RGIPT.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Petroleum Technology located?
faq.answer: The institute is located in Bengaluru, Karnataka.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification link will be available in the 'Important Links' section of this article.
